article_meta.title: A California judge scolded members of Mark Zuckerberg's legal team after they showed up to a Los Angeles courtroom weari

reasoning: One clear attribution violation (flagged a quoted source phrase) and some missed author-prose bias. Labels applied correctly on valid items.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged 'an extraordinary misstep,' which is explicitly attributed to Jacob Ward in quotes — not the author's voice.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Of three items, one is not author prose (quoted/attributed), making it a false positive.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed defensible author-prose bias such as 'closely watched trial,' 'claims that strike at the heart of the national debate...,' and the unattributed 'raising concerns about privacy and courtroom security.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: For the valid items, 'high-stakes' as Sensationalism/Emotionalism and 'scolded' as Word Choice are appropriate labels.
